layout.spacing: Generous spacing for containers (p-8 to p-12), dense spacing for data tables and inputs (p-2 to p-4).
layout.grid: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Tight gap-4 to gap-6. Left column for inputs, right column for rate breakdown results.
layout.radius: rounded-sm (Subtle roundness, max 4px border-radius for technical/business feel)
layout.shadows: Minimal. 1px solid borders preferred over soft shadows. Use shadow-sm for active states.

components.login_page: Split screen layout. Left side: immersive background image with brand overlay. Right side: stark white login form with solid borders.
components.calculator_form: Grid-based form layout. Inputs should use Shadcn Select/Input with sharp borders. Clear grouping of dimensions vs weight.
components.rate_breakdown: Tabular or receipt-style list. Distinct rows for Base Rate, ESS Fee, Fuel Surcharge, GST, Margin, Total. Highlight the Total INR in a high-contrast accent box (e.g., Deep Navy background with White text).
components.admin_settings: Slide-out drawer or clean modal (Shadcn Sheet/Dialog) for setting surcharges (Fuel, GST, Margin) without leaving the context.
components.country_table: Data-dense Shadcn Table component. Sticky header, scrollable body. Pagination if 225+ rows.
components.buttons: Sharp corners or rounded-sm. Solid colors. Hover state should darken the primary color and keep text readable.

motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. 150ms ease-in-out for hover states. No bouncy animations. Serious B2B feel.
motion.loading: Skeleton loaders for calculation results, not spinners.

images.description: Abstract global logistics network map for the left side of the login page.
Cargo ship in port, can be used as an alternate background or hero banner inside the admin context.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React single-page app containing a Login screen and a protected Dashboard (Calculator + Admin).
Implement the UI using Shadcn components customized with a rigid, high-contrast B2B aesthetic (Archetype 4).
Avoid using generic purple or teal. Stick to Deep Navy, Stark White, and Signal Blue/Red accents.
The Rate Calculator must have inputs for Destination Country (searchable dropdown), Weight (kg), Shipment Type (Document/Non-Document), and Dimensions.
The Results view should look like a professional logistics quote/receipt, clearly breaking down Base Rate, ESS, Fuel (47.75%), GST (18%), Local charges, Margin, and Final Total.
Include an Admin settings panel (via Dialog or Sheet) allowing users to configure these percentages.
Include a Country-to-Zone reference table view to show the underlying routing data.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='calculate-rate-button').
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided login_background for the login page.
